testcase.name: test_get_admin_sellers
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:152: in test_get_admin_sellers assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_fabric_create_requires_dispatch_timeline
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:176: in test_fabric_create_requires_dispatch_timeline assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Should reject missing dispatch_timeline: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Should reject missing dispatch_timeline: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","color"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Fabric_No_Dispatch","category_id":"cat-cotton","fabric_type":"woven","width":"58 inches","moq":"500","description":"Test fabric","stock_type":"ready_stock"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_fabric_create_validates_dispatch_preset
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:198: in test_fabric_create_validates_dispatch_preset assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Should reject invalid dispatch: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Should reject invalid dispatch: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","color"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Fabric_Invalid_Dispatch","category_id":"cat-cotton","fabric_type":"woven","width":"58 inches","moq":"500","description":"Test fabric","stock_type":"ready_stock","dispatch_timeline":"99 days"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_fabric_create_validates_mto_dispatch_mismatch
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:219: in test_fabric_create_validates_mto_dispatch_mismatch assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Should reject MTO with ready_stock dispatch: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Should reject MTO with ready_stock dispatch: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","color"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Fabric_MTO_Mismatch","category_id":"cat-cotton","fabric_type":"woven","width":"58 inches","moq":"500","description":"Test fabric","stock_type":"made_to_order","dispatch_timeline":"3-5 days"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_fabric_create_valid_dispatch
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:239: in test_fabric_create_valid_dispatch assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Should accept valid dispatch: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Should accept valid dispatch: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","color"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Fabric_Valid_Dispatch","category_id":"cat-cotton","fabric_type":"woven","width":"58 inches","moq":"500","description":"Test fabric","stock_type":"ready_stock","dispatch_timeline":"3-5 days"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_brand_order_razorpay_missing_fields

failure.message: assert ('razorpay' in '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}' or 'missing' in '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}') + where '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927416130>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927416130> = '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}'.lower + where '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}' = <Response [400]>.text + and '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927320930>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927320930> = '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}'.lower + where '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}' = <Response [400]>.text

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:492: in test_brand_order_razorpay_missing_fields assert "razorpay" in resp.text.lower() or "missing" in resp.text.lower() E assert ('razorpay' in '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}' or 'missing' in '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}') E + where '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927416130>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927416130> = '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}'.lower E + where '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}' = <Response [400]>.text E + and '{"detail":"test vendor fabric - pending approval: qty 100 below moq 500"}' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927320930>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xfcd927320930> = '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}'.lower E + where '{"detail":"Test Vendor Fabric - Pending Approval: qty 100 below MOQ 500"}' = <Response [400]>.text

testcase.name: test_cloudinary_upload_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Cloudinary upload should require auth: 404 assert 404 in [401, 403, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_regression_v38.py:602: in test_cloudinary_upload_requires_auth assert resp.status_code in [401, 403, 422], f"Cloudinary upload should require auth: {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Cloudinary upload should require auth: 404 E assert 404 in [401, 403, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
